User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public and private profile data for registered users

userId.description: The unique user ID matching Firebase Auth uid

GameLog.title: Game Completion Log
GameLog.description: Log of a game played and completed by players

userId.description: ID of the user who played

gameName.description: Name of the game (e.g., tictactoe, ludo)

roomId.description: ID of the room where the game was played

outcome.description: Outcome of the game for this player (won/lost/draw)

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information keyed by auth uid
